api_key.description: CommCare HQ API key. Sent as an ApiKey-scheme Authorization header (Authorization: ApiKey <api_key>); never logged.

project_space.description: CommCare HQ project space slug; substituted into every stream path (a/{{ config.project_space }}/api/v0.5/<resource>/).

app_id.description: Optional CommCare application id; when set, scopes both streams to this app via the app_id query parameter.

base_url.description: CommCare HQ base URL override for self-hosted instances, tests, or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
